text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
At last, the day of my debut has<n>arrived. With
victory, I shall rise to<n>become the new shining star
the<n>masses so desire.

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
A thunderous declaration! My<n>followers watch in
awe as I turn my<n>imposing back and make for the
battlefield!
